normalization.notes: Store Sinhala text in NFC while preserving source order for vowel signs, al-lakuna, anusvara, and conjunct-forming sequences. Analysis tooling may inspect akshara structure and rendered clusters without rewriting source text.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: independent vowels, consonant bases, dependent vowel signs, inherent vowel, al-lakuna, anusvara, conjunct chunks, and common akshara frames
segmentation.notes: Sinhala uses visible word spaces but decoding still depends on aksharas. Count code points, grapheme clusters, visible aksharas, vowel signs, and teachable base-plus-vowel units separately because al-lakuna and conjuncts affect both rendering and pronunciation.
